title: Data Link Layer
description: Provides node-to-node data transfer using MAC addresses.
fullExplanation: The Data Link Layer provides reliable transfer of data across a physical link. It uses MAC (Media Access Control) addresses to identify devices on the local network. This layer handles framing (adding headers/trailers), error detection (CRC), flow control, and media access control (CSMA/CD for Ethernet). Switches operate at this layer. The layer is divided into two sublayers: LLC (Logical Link Control) and MAC (Media Access Control).
keyFacts: Switches forward frames based on MAC table
ARP resolves IP addresses to MAC addresses
